subject: initial release for the istanbul release
commit_message:
initial release for the istanbul release

Issue-ID: SO-3652

Signed-off-by: seshukm <seshu.kumar.m@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I085ceb957876e37ef46ae9fdd5a928934f2f21eb

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/5570/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.logging-analytics:logging-slf4j:jar:1.6.9-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.so:so:pom:1.8.0-SNAPSHOT: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.onap.logging-analytics:logging-slf4j:jar:1.6.9-SNAPSHOT, org.onap.logging-analytics:logging-filter-base:jar:1.6.9-SNAPSHOT, org.onap.logging-analytics:logging-filter-spring:jar:1.6.9-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/5570/ )
